# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agents.md

GitHub issue templates for the Arkova repository.

## Files
- **`bug_report.md`** — bug report template with fields for repro steps, environment, viewport, and user role.
- **`feature_request.md`** — feature request template using user-story format with acceptance criteria and priority levels (P0-P3).
- **`config.yml`** — enables blank issues and links to the Jira board for work item management.

## Conventions
- Jira is the source of truth for status. GitHub issues are supplementary; real work tracking lives in Jira.
